NOTICE RE DEFAULT ISSUED

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vincent A. Harrington, Jr., Esq., of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, (510) 337-1001, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
Jill J. Figg, Deputy City Attorney, 554-3971, for Defendant and Moving Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 790's Petition To Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute was taken under submission. Petitioner is to submit a proposed order. Respondent submitted a proposed order. (301/JLW/dm) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Continued To May-17-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Continued To May-11-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 790'S Motion to Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute is continued to May 11, 2006 on the Court's own motion. Respondents may file one three-page surreply to address arguments and case law raised in Section II of Petitioner's Reply, which were inappropriately excluded from Petitioner's moving papers. The surreply is due by May 8, 2006. Respondent is directed to lodge courtesy copies of the surreply with Department 301 with a cover letter referencing the new hearing date. Petitioner is not to file any supplemental papers. (301/JLW/dm) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute
Off Calendar Apr-19-2006 Continued To Apr-26-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION, LOCAL 790'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Labor-Management Dispute [C.C.P. SECTION 1281.2] IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 26, 2006 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING, OPPOSITION & REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 301 AS SOON AS POSSIBLE WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE CONTINUANCE DATE. (301/JLW/ju) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
